template_blue_residual_note: median |RINJ-projection| of MS-template LOO residuals / mean flux; large => BP-excess pre-baked in templates. Compare to injected severity.
verdict_note: Trust the LOO block. GO if (LOO) spurious_rate >> baseline_fpr, gof_AUC ~0.5 (per-object GoF blind), auc_dchi2_perobj <=0.5 (anti-informative), and auc_gate_honest well above 0.5. If LOO baseline_fpr or spurious on clean is high, the library is too sparse (confound) — report, do not claim GO.
